Read PRD.md for the full product specification, KNOWN_ISSUES.md for all known pitfalls and workarounds, and copilot-instructions.md for workspace conventions. Then follow the phased plan in regenerate-repo.prompt.md to rebuild the entire Marketing Mix Modelling project end-to-end — scaffold the directory structure, create all src modules, execute all 9 notebooks in order (NB01 through NB09) using the workflow in notebook-execution.instructions.md, build the Streamlit dashboard, and generate the PowerPoint report. After each notebook, append an insights markdown cell. Respect cross-notebook data flow dependencies and cache all MCMC results. Use model_config.yaml as the single source of truth for all parameters.
